nodes.name: Várzea forest
nodes.summary: Várzea forest是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联206种鸟类，包括Blue-throated piping guan、White-throated piping guan、Spix's guan等206种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 常綠森林

nodes.name: Speckled spinetail
nodes.summary: Speckled spinetail（Speckled spinetail，学名 Thripophaga gutturata），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联11个分布地点节点。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The speckled spinetail (Thripophaga gutturata) is a species of bird in the Furnariinae subfamily of the ovenbird family Furnariidae. It is found in Bolivia, Brazil, Colombia, Ecuador, French Guiana, Peru, Suriname, and Venezuela.Remsen, J
